name: Edmund Jenkins
abstract: Edmund Thornton Jenkins (1894–1926) was an American composer who spent much of his life in Europe.

about_quotes.speaker: Amos White
about_quotes.evidence: Mr. Jenkins' son, Edmund, who had won seven consecutive scholarships... was back, uh, and he took charge of the band. It's quite an honor to have the son of the president directed the band.

about_quotes.speaker: Arthur Briggs
about_quotes.evidence: I was fortunate when I went to London with Mr. Cook with the orchestra, through Mr. Jenkins, I shall never forget Edmund Jenkins
